Choose a person from your team to represent you. I am on holidays with my family in Naples, Italy. It is beautiful here, but dirty. There is a Volcano called Vesuvius that is 1,281 metres high. Vesuvius erupted thousands of years ago and buried a city called Pompeii under the ashes! I go through the town every day to buy breakfast. Yesterday we went to Pompeii that is South of Naples. It is smaller and quieter than Naples because no one lives

play. Project, Think Back, and Final Review! Our Giant Atlas! in your notebook or on a sheet b. Choose a person from your team to represent you. I am on holidays with my family in Naples, Italy. It is beautiful here, but dirty. There is a Volcano called Vesuvius that is 1,281 metres high. Vesuvius erupted thousands of years ago and buried a city called Pompeii under the ashes! I go through the town every day to buy breakfast. Yesterday we went to Pompeii that is South of Naples. It is smaller and quieter than Naples because no one lives here. I like Pompeii.
